flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Regent University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.8k → $21.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Regent University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.8k → $21.6k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Regent University fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (52.4% → 47.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Regent University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
